comments.author: @kingslj
comments.text: Thanks for this lovely, unique, amazing & interesting documentary with rich historical info. I’ve enjoyed watching it & learning more about Cape Verde, which I did not know much about

replies.author: @PlanetVista4K
replies.text: We’re so happy you enjoyed learning about the history and beauty of these islands! ❤

comments.author: @3bsd69bhmdfawp9
comments.text: Who doesn't know or have heard about Cape Verde before the 2026 World Cup???

replies.author: @PlanetVista4K
replies.text: Ha — the 2026 World Cup really did put Cape Verde on the map for a lot of people! But these islands had a fascinating story long before the football. Thanks for watching.

comments.author: @Luv4MGL.24-7
comments.text:
🤨🤔🧐🤦🏽‍♂️🙅🏽‍♂️4:42 These people getting water are not my Cabo Verdean 🇨🇻 People. Cabo Verdean People don't drink or take showers 🚿 in dirty water.

4:51 That part with Black kids getting vaccinated 💉, are not my Cabo Verdean People. We have decent Hospital 🏥 facilities. We don't medically treat kids outside in a dirty environment. 

Why are you people showing images of people that live on the continent of Africa? 
Instead of documenting pictures of people who actually lives in the Cabo Verde Islands 🇨🇻 🏝️.

You people are so busy trying hard to create and fabricate negative images. Deliberately invoking disparaging sceneries about Cabo Verde 🇨🇻 & citizens of Cabo Verde.

I only watched 5 minutes of this video, and I got sick by watching it. 
Too much misinformation going on in this video.

Whoever created this video is disgraceful disgusting 🤢 🤮🫵🏽!
Get a better job, and try not lying when you do the job. 🫵🏽😡

replies.author: @Luv4MGL.24-7
replies.text: ​@PlanetVista4K🤔🧐 Well misinformation can give bad names to people, as well as places. Misinformation is a Sin in God's eyes. When you do something wrong you fix it, you don't just apologize. 🤷🏽‍♂️

replies.author: @PlanetVista4K
replies.text: The footage at 4:42 and 4:51 was filmed in Guinea-Bissau, not Cabo Verde. This was a production error during editing. We apologize for the misinformation.

replies.author: @PlanetVista4K
replies.text: Thanks for watching our documentary on these unique islands. 🏝️

comments.author: @Skaiblue101
comments.text: The narrator forgot to mention that Cabo Verde is situated in the central Atlantic Ocean, off the coast of West Africa. An African country.

replies.author: @PlanetVista4K
replies.text: Thanks for providing that important geographical context!

comments.author: @PlanetVista4K
comments.text: Thank you for exploring Cape Verde with us! 🌍 If you enjoyed this journey, don't forget to like, subscribe, and share. 👉 Which hidden destination should we uncover next?
